test-method.name: testPatientAppearsInSearch
test-method.description: TC_P06 – Verify patient appears in search after creation

exception.message: Expected condition failed: waiting for visibility of element located by By.xpath: //input[@placeholder='Search Patient' or @id='patientName'] (tried for 15 second(s) with 500 milliseconds interval) Build info: version: '4.18.1', revision: 'b1d3319b48' System info: os.name: 'Windows 11', os.arch: 'amd64', os.version: '10.0', java.version: '17.0.7' Driver info: org.openqa.selenium.chrome.ChromeDriver Capabilities {acceptInsecureCerts: false, browserName: chrome, browserVersion: 149.0.7827.102, chrome: {chromedriverVersion: 149.0.7827.55 (3188f8a607ae..., userDataDir: C:\Users\INFINI~1\AppData\L...}, fedcm:accounts: true, goog:chromeOptions: {debuggerAddress: localhost:57489}, goog:processID: 11964, networkConnectionEnabled: false, pageLoadStrategy: normal, platformName: windows, proxy: Proxy(), se:cdp: ws://localhost:57489/devtoo..., se:cdpVersion: 149.0.7827.102, setWindowRect: true, strictFileInteractability: false, timeouts: {implicit: 0, pageLoad: 300000, script: 30000}, unhandledPromptBehavior: dismiss and notify, webauthn:extension:credBlob: true, webauthn:extension:largeBlob: true, webauthn:extension:minPinLength: true, webauthn:extension:prf: true, webauthn:virtualAuthenticators: true} Session ID: bbe2ee17892b1844ace290085f12cfb7
